cleanup.postgres: SELECT pg_terminate_backend(pid) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname='zitadel' AND pid<>pg_backend_pid(); DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS zitadel; DROP USER IF EXISTS zitadel;

ssl.description: Zitadel with SSL and Postgres with SSL

cleanup.postgres: SELECT pg_terminate_backend(pid) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname='zitadel' AND pid<>pg_backend_pid(); DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS zitadel; DROP USER IF EXISTS zitadel;
